epic.arc: The foreign review of exports/consequence-graph/ comes home as work. Each finding is a proposed atom under this one arc; bdo's confirm-arc queues them all, his decline retires them — either way the review stops stranding as context.
epic.context: Returned through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059) against seal 25dfa4e81552… on exports/log.jsonl. The reviewer saw a sealed snapshot, so every finding is PROPOSED and unverified: the value gate judges each story and a session verifies its claim against the live repo before any is acted on.
epic.value: A foreign review becomes value-gated, queued work instead of read-only context — the return leg the one-way envoy lacked.
epic.horizon: Every finding judged by the value gate and either carried under bdo's confirmed arc or refused; none hand-carried into a doc.

pieces.glue: Reframe the spine: the consequence graph is the auditable PLANE of a larger consequence memory (a fold over the objective and felt fields), not the whole system. Name it a plane in the architecture; v0 still builds the plane first as the smallest auditable slice. (Naming/arc is bdo s — proposed.)

Add a first-class consequence node kind to v0, distinct from work-units: a cited consequence node exists only when a sensor (heal/retro/digest) proves a changed state not identical to the work unit. This is what makes v0 a consequence view and not a prettier provenance view — the answer to the meta-seam.

v0 mark types are failure and repair ONLY; defer both exemplar and value. Do not derive exemplar from passing gates — a pass is the correctness floor, not excellence, and a floor-derived exemplar poisons the target (sharpens our seam-2 lean, which deferred only value).

Propagation is a bounded breadth-first walk per mark: radius 2, threshold 0.20, per-edge-kind decay table, no convergence/iteration, cycles do not matter; keep strongest contribution per mark/channel/node, sum same-channel contributions, keep channels separate.

Hard propagation rules: actor nodes and authorship edges render but never propagate (no super-spreader through --by); arc nodes receive aggregation but never fan out to sibling atoms (no lateral smear); never net across mark types (a thing can be loved and broken, repaired and still historically dragged).

Before value/money ever propagates, split it into at least loved / adopted / reused / pattern_setting — each grounded in a different evidence kind (local / network / structural-dependency / temporal-doctrinal) and propagating differently. No scalar money. (Definition stays bdo s; this is the mechanism that keeps it from taste-only collapse.)
Use one node shape with a kind field rather than heterogeneous node classes (answers schema seam 1): heterogeneous classes make propagation brittle too early.

The keystone acceptance test is a fixture log (two atom versions, a negating receipt on the old, a later advancing receipt on the live, a heal stale-park finding, a derived consequence node, an arc membership, an authored_by edge, and one deliberately-bad mark citation) asserting tier-1 edges only, drag+repair marks created, consequence node only when cited, decaying propagation that does NOT cross actor hubs or arc siblings, ghost citation refused as a gap, deterministic across two runs. If the test cannot refuse the ghost, the fold is not real.
